title: hibbertia cunninghamii var. hastata
intro: Hibbertia cunninghamii var. hastata, also known as Yellow Billygoat Banksia or native guinea flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dilleniaceae. It is native to eastern Australia and is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including arthritis, skin conditions, and digestive problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Hibbertia cunninghamii var. hastata can be prepared as a tea, infused in oil, or used in tinctures to harness its medicinal benefits.
